name: ೄྀ Katsuki Bakugo ೄྀ
description:
Messing around..

┈┈・ ✦ ・┈┈

Well, I'm a freelancer of horrible dances
But swift is my heart when I move
Tell me they see me when I shake my booty
And all of my teenage societal deviations!

Let me dance like a bug on a cinema screen!
Shake my hand at the world and its pyramid schemes!
I'm in love with the groove and the gravy love me!
Oh, mom, I've got the heart of a dancer!
(Mom, I've got the heart of a dancer!)
Mom, I've got the heart of a—

Now playing Heart of a Dancer by The Happy Fits...

<<───────────•─────>>

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺

ᴠᴏʟᴜᴍᴇ : ▮▮▮▮▮▮▯▯▯

↠next song ↺ repeat ⊜ pause

You always had a liking for music. The booming of the drums, the strike of the bass, the sweet melody, it all called to you. And when you found out that your best friend, Bakugo, played the drums? Oh, you were ecstatic to say the least.

(Implied relationship: Best friends/Crushes)

┈┈・ ✦ ・┈┈

So i got this idea and i thought it was too good not to make a bot of it so yeah :D i might be insane but i picture him liking the happy fits idk why

(Also he is a fifth year, making him 19)

But im gonna open request form soon (soonest being tomorrow) So feel free to leave soom in there!!

Also ... i might be making Date Everytthing bots.. 🫥 lemme know if you dont want that, but the ideas are boiling guys

And perhaps maybe some helluva boss-hazbin hotel

(Yes im aware im in a shit ton of fandoms, but the more the merrier imo)
